name: Treacherous Trapdoor
desc: Until the end of the game, each time any player from either team enters a square containing a Trapdoor for any reason, roll a D6. On a 1, the Trapdoor falls open and the player falls through it — they are immediately removed from the pitch and placed in the Reserves Box.

name: Friends with the Ref
desc: Until the end of the game, when this team's Coach uses the Argue the Call rule, they are successful on a roll of 5 or 6 rather than the usual 6.

name: Stiletto
desc: Until the end of the game, one randomly selected player on this team gains the Stab trait. If the selected player already has this trait, select again until a player without it is chosen.

name: Iron Man
desc: Until the end of the game, select one player on this team. That player improves their Armour Value characteristic by 1, up to a maximum of 11+.

name: Knuckle Dusters
desc: Until the end of the game, select one player on this team. That player gains the Mighty Blow (+1) skill.

name: Bad Habits
desc: Until the end of the game, randomly select D3 opposition players that are playing in this game. Each selected player gains the Loner (2+) trait for the duration of the game.

name: Greasy Cleats
desc: Until the end of the game, select one opposition player currently on the pitch. That player reduces their Movement Allowance characteristic by 1, down to a minimum of 1.

name: Blessing of Nuffle
desc: Until the end of the game, select one player on this team. That player gains the Pro skill.

name: Moles Under the Pitch
desc: Until the end of the game, whenever any opposition player attempts to Rush, they must apply an additional -1 modifier to the roll.

name: Perfect Passing
desc: Until the end of the game, whenever a player on this team makes a Completion, they earn 2 Star Player Points instead of 1.

name: Dazzling Catching
desc: Until the end of the game, whenever a player on this team makes a successful Catch as part of a Pass Action (not a Hand-off), they earn 1 Star Player Point.

name: Fan Interaction
desc: Until the end of the game, whenever a player on this team pushes an opposition player into the crowd, the pushing player earns 2 Star Player Points.

name: Fouling Frenzy
desc: Until the end of the game, whenever a player on this team causes a Casualty as the result of a Foul Action, the fouling player earns 2 Star Player Points.

name: Throw a Rock
desc: Once during the game, this team's Coach may declare they are using this prayer. Randomly select one opposition player currently on the pitch — that player is immediately Knocked Down on a D6 roll of 4+. If the roll fails, nothing happens.

name: Under Scrutiny
desc: Until the end of the game, any opposition player that performs a Foul Action is automatically Sent-off if they break the target's armour, regardless of whether a natural double was rolled on the Armour check.

name: Intensive Training
desc: Select one player on this team. That player immediately gains a single Primary skill of your choosing. This skill is lost at the end of the game and awards no Star Player Points.
